title: Purification of human ATP13A2 for cryo-EM analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e9na2","text":"Purification of GFP-tagged human ATP13A2 expressed in Sf9 cells for cryo-EM analysis","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7m5jn","text":"Lysis Buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ekt35","text":"50 mM Tris pH 7.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aq8l6","text":"200 mM NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ln42","text":"1 mM EDTA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"66kcd","text":"1 mM DTT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8us84","text":"10% glycerol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"68nb5","text":"Plus protease inhibitors (5 µg/mL aprotinin, 5 µg/mL leupeptin, 1 µg/mL pepstatin A, and 2 mM PMSF)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e0bou","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fcmim","text":"Wash Buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fb91c","text":"25 mM Tris pH 7.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bsivd","text":"100 mM NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eco44","text":"1 mM EDTA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"78u37","text":"1 mM DTT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2bprj","text":"0.03% DDM/ 0.006% CHS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw Sf9 cell pellets at room temperature (typical size around 10 g from 0.7L of culture)
All subsequent steps performed at 4 °C
Resuspend each pellet in 30 mL Lysis Buffer (use 3x volume of cell pellet, 40 mL total volume)
Homogenize pellet with Dounce homogenizer, 100 plunges tight on ice
Pour lysate into pre-chilled 50 mL centrifuge tubes
Spin in centrifuge at 4000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes to remove unbroken cells
Transfer supernatant to pre-chilled ultracentrifuge rotor tubes
Spin lysate in ultracentrifuge at 100000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour 30 minutes to pellet membranes (Beckman Type 45 Ti rotor)

Resuspend membrane pellet in Lysis Buffer and final volume 1% DDM/0.2% CHS (1X pellet, 7X Lysis Buffer, 2X 5% DDM/1% CHS) DDM: n-dodecyl-β-D-maltopyranoside (Anatrace) CHS: cholesteryl hemisuccinate (Anatrace)
Solubilize by rotating end-over-end for 02:30:00 at 4 °C
Clarify lysate in ultracentrifuge at 100000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour
Equilibrate 1 mL Sepharose beads conjugated with anti-GFP nanobody with Wash Buffer
Add beads to gravity column and wash with 10 mL wash buffer
After ultracentrifugation is complete, transfer supernatant into 50 mL falcon tube
Add 1 mL equilibrated anti-GFP nanobody beads to tube
Incubate by rotating end-over-end for 02:30:00 at 4 °C
Transfer to gravity column and let flow-through drain
Wash beads with 30 column volumes of Wash Buffer
Add 5 mL Wash Buffer to gravity column and 10 µg/mL HRV 3C protease
Incubate by rotating end-over-end overnight at 4 °C
Equilibrate Superose 6 Increase 10/300 GL column with Wash Buffer
Concentrate the protein to 0.5 mL using an Amicon Ultrafilter (cut-off 100kDa)
After concentration, spin protein at 17000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes
Injected sample into FPLC
Collect peak fractions and concentrate to approximately 5-7 mg/mL for cryo-EM grid preparation
creator: Sue Sim
